Test Description: Configure 8 DMA channels with per-channel descriptors, enable DMA interrupts, trigger transfers via debug instruction path, wait for interrupt, and verify data integrity per channel.
Remarks: Conditional IRQ enable based on platform define: MPS_DMA -> MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN; APS_DMA -> MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN. Parameters: DATA_LEN_IN_BYTES=16, SRC_BURST=4, DST_BURST=4, SRC/DST size=32 bits. Note: initialize_memory loop uses desc_addr[i] while iterating j (as written).
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry: test_case()
1) Declare locals: i,j,cntr; dma_go_code; inst0,inst1; iter = DATA_LEN_IN_BYTES/(SRC_BURST*(SRC_SIZE_IN_BITS/8)); loc; arrays src_addr[8], dst_addr[8], desc_addr[8], desc_addr_actual[8] initialized with constants SRC_ADDR_CHx, DST_ADDR_CHx, DESC_ADDR_CHx.
2) Conditional IRQ setup:
   2.a) If compiled with MPS_DMA: call GIC_EnableIRQ(0x7); WRITE MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN with 0x80 via write_reg(MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN, 0x80).
   2.b) Else if compiled with APS_DMA: call GIC_EnableIRQ(0x17); WRITE MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN with 0x80 via write_reg(MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN, 0x80).
3) For j = 0..7: call initialize_memory(desc_addr[i]).
4) Print: Inside Testcase".

Test Description: loc).  // loop and load/store in descriptor

SS / Module: i); then DMA_END(loc).  // event and end of descriptor

Index: 5.8) READ MIZAR_DMA_INTEN via read_reg(MIZAR_DMA_INTEN); OR with (0x00000001 << i); WRITE back to MIZAR_DMA_INTEN via write_reg(MIZAR_DMA_INTEN

SS / Module: MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN, MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN, MIZAR_DMA_INTEN, MIZAR_DMA_DBGINST0, MIZAR_DMA_DBGINST1, MIZAR_DMA_DBGCMD
Test Case Name:
- Data integrity check: For each i in 0..7, the return of data_integrity(src_addr[i], dst_addr[i], DATA_LEN_IN_BYTES) is assigned to variable 'fail'.
- Final result: finish(fail) is invoked; PASS if finish is called with argument 0; FAIL otherwise (non-zero).

Test Description: Default reset value verification and masked write-read verification across 92 DMAC registers using arrays of addresses, default values, read/write masks, and skip controls.
Remarks: Operates over 92 register addresses defined in test_define.c arrays. DEBUG_DISPLAY controls printf diagnostics. soft_reset_chk() exists but is commented out in test_case (not executed).
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry: test_case()
1) Call chk_rst_val():
   1.1) Loop i=0..CNT-1 (CNT=92): set addr = addr_array[i].
   1.2) If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: print skip (if DEBUG_DISPLAY); continue.
   1.3) READ data_rd = read_reg(addr).
   1.4) If (data_rd == default_value_array[i]): (optional PASS print if DEBUG_DISPLAY); else def_fail_cnt++ and print failure with addr, expected, read.
2) (Optional) DEBUG prints end of default check.
3) Call chk_rd_wr():
   3.1) Define chk_val[6] = {0xffffffff, 0xaaaaaaaa, 0x55555555, 0x00000000, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xffff0000}.
   3.2) For j=0..5: set data_wr = chk_val[j].
       Writing phase per j:
       3.2.1) For i=0..CNT-1: addr = addr_array[i].
              - If skip_array[i] == 1: (optional print) continue.
              - If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: (optional print) continue.
              - Else: WRITE register via write_reg(addr, data_wr); (optional print).
       Reading/verification phase per j:
       3.2.2) For i=0..CNT-1: addr = addr_array[i].
              - If skip_array[i] == 1: (optional print) continue.
              - If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: (optional print) continue.
              - If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: (optional print) continue.
              - Else:
                a) READ data_rd = read_reg(addr).
                b) Compute wr_n = (write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff).
                c) Compute exp_val = ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])).
                d) If (data_rd == exp_val): (optional PASS print) else { wr_fail_cnt++; print failure with addr, expected, read }.
4) (Optional) DEBUG prints end of write-read check.
5) In test_case(): if (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) finish(1); else finish(0).
Impacted Registers: MIZAR_DMA_DSR, MIZAR_DMA_DPC, MIZAR_DMA_INTEN, MIZAR_DMA_INT_EVENT_RIS, MIZAR_DMA_INTMIS, MIZAR_DMA_INTCLR, MIZAR_DMA_FSRD, MIZAR_DMA_FSRC, MIZAR_DMA_FTRD, MIZAR_DMA_FTR0, MIZAR_DMA_FTR1, MIZAR_DMA_FTR2, MIZAR_DMA_FTR3, MIZAR_DMA_FTR4, MIZAR_DMA_FTR5, MIZAR_DMA_FTR6, MIZAR_DMA_FTR7, MIZAR_DMA_CSR0, MIZAR_DMA_CSR1, MIZAR_DMA_CSR2, MIZAR_DMA_CSR3, MIZAR_DMA_CSR4, MIZAR_DMA_CSR5, MIZAR_DMA_CSR6, MIZAR_DMA_CSR7, MIZAR_DMA_CPC0, MIZAR_DMA_CPC1, MIZAR_DMA_CPC2, MIZAR_DMA_CPC3, MIZAR_DMA_CPC4, MIZAR_DMA_CPC5, MIZAR_DMA_CPC6, MIZAR_DMA_CPC7, MIZAR_DMA_SAR0, MIZAR_DMA_SAR1, MIZAR_DMA_SAR2, MIZAR_DMA_SAR3, MIZAR_DMA_SAR4, MIZAR_DMA_SAR5, MIZAR_DMA_SAR6, MIZAR_DMA_SAR7, MIZAR_DMA_DAR0, MIZAR_DMA_DAR1, MIZAR_DMA_DAR2, MIZAR_DMA_DAR3, MIZAR_DMA_DAR4, MIZAR_DMA_DAR5, MIZAR_DMA_DAR6, MIZAR_DMA_DAR7, MIZAR_DMA_CCR0, MIZAR_DMA_CCR1, MIZAR_DMA_CCR2, MIZAR_DMA_CCR3, MIZAR_DMA_CCR4, MIZAR_DMA_CCR5, MIZAR_DMA_CCR6, MIZAR_DMA_CCR7, MIZAR_DMA_LC0_0, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_1, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_2, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_3, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_4, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_5, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_6, MIZAR_DMA_LCO_7, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_0, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_1, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_2, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_3, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_4, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_5, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_6, MIZAR_DMA_LC1_7, MIZAR_DMA_DBGSTATUS, MIZAR_DMA_DBGCMD, MIZAR_DMA_DBGINST0, MIZAR_DMA_DBGINST1, MIZAR_DMA_CR0, MIZAR_DMA_CR1, MIZAR_DMA_CR2, MIZAR_DMA_CR3, MIZAR_DMA_CR4, MIZAR_DMA_CRD, MIZAR_DMA_WD, MIZAR_DMA_PERIPH_ID_0, MIZAR_DMA_PERIPH_ID_1, MIZAR_DMA_PERIPH_ID_2, MIZAR_DMA_PERIPH_ID_3, MIZAR_DMA_PCELL_ID_0, MIZAR_DMA_PCELL_ID_1, MIZAR_DMA_PCELL_ID_2, MIZAR_DMA_PCELL_ID_3
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- Reset value check in chk_rst_val(): For addresses with read_mask_array[i] != 0, PASS per address if read_reg(addr_array[i]) == default_value_array[i]; otherwise def_fail_cnt++.
- Write-read check in chk_rd_wr(): For each pattern and address with write_mask_array[i] != 0 and read_mask_array[i] != 0 and skip_array[i] == 0, PASS per address if read_reg(addr) == ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); otherwise wr_fail_cnt++.
- Final outcome in test_case(): PASS if (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0) leading to finish(0); FAIL otherwise leading to finish(1).
